must_distinguish.note: 偷偷 = secretly, concealing intent or action from others; 悄悄 = quietly, without noise — may or may not involve secrecy

cedict_en: children; sons and daughters/a young man and a young woman (in love)
dataset_meanings: a young man and a young woman (in love)

must_distinguish.note: 子女 = sons and daughters (neutral formal, legal/statistical contexts); 儿女 = sons and daughters (slightly more literary/emotional register)

cedict_en: early or late; first and last; priority/in succession; one after another

must_distinguish.note: All mean 'one after another'. 先后 stresses ordered sequence; 陆续 stresses a gradual continuous stream; 接连 stresses unbroken succession (no gap); 纷纷 stresses many acting simultaneously/in a rush (en masse).
All relate to 'light'; 光 = light in general or 'only/merely'; 灯 = lamp/fixture; 光线 = ray or quality of (natural) light; 灯光 = artificial lighting or stage light.
兔 = literary/zodiac form, used in compounds (兔年); 兔子 = everyday colloquial word for rabbit/hare
全体 = the whole group/collective (noun-like, e.g. 全体成员); 全部 = the entire amount/all of it (noun modifier); 全都 = adverb 'all without exception' (modifies verbs)

cedict_en: everyone present/the whole audience/across-the-board/unanimously/whole duration (of a competition or match)
dataset_meanings: whole duration (of a competition or match)

must_distinguish.note: 全场 = whole audience/venue; 全部 (5k) = the total amount/all of it; 整 = exactly whole (整十年); 整整 = a full emphatic duration (整整三天); 整个 (5k) = the entire X as modifier; 整体 (5k) = the whole as a unified entity (noun).
全年 = the whole year / annual (total: 全年产量); 终年 (5k) = all year round OR age at death (literary); 常年 (5k) = year-round habitually / for years on end (habitual duration).
全身 is neutral 'the whole body'; 浑身 (5k) adds emotional weight, often 'all over / soaked / aching'; 一身 emphasizes a state covering the person (一身汗 = covered in sweat), often in set phrases.
全体 = the whole group/collective (noun-like, e.g. 全体成员); 全部 = the entire amount/all of it (noun modifier); 全都 = adverb 'all without exception' (modifies verbs)
公交车 = city transit bus (urban public transport system); 大巴 = coach/large bus (intercity or hired, not a scheduled city line)
Both mean kilogram. 公斤 is the everyday spoken form; 千克 is the official SI/scientific term, used in technical and written contexts.
共享 = jointly share/use something (shared resources, infrastructure); 分享 = share with others by passing on or communicating (feelings, content, experiences)

cedict_en: to close (a door)/to turn off (light, electrical equipment etc)
dataset_meanings: to turn off (light, electrical equipment etc)

must_distinguish.note: 关上 = close/shut (physical objects: door, window; also turn off); 闭幕 = close/end an event (ceremony, conference, exhibition — formal).

cedict_en: to raise (animals)/to bring up (children)/to keep (pets)/to support/to give birth

must_distinguish.note: 养 = general raise/keep (children or pets); 饲养 = feed and raise animals (husbandry); 抚养 = raise and provide for children (legal/familial); 培养 = nurture/develop people or skills (education context)
内心 = one's inner self/depths (literary, formal introspection); 心里 = in one's heart/mind right now (colloquial, situational feeling)

meaning_en: never again (needs 不: 再也不)

must_distinguish.note: 再也 requires an explicit negative (再也不/没); 不再 already contains the negation and stands alone

cedict_en: old variant of 冒[mao4]/surname Mao/to emit; to give off; to send out (or up, forth)/to brave; to face/(bound form) reckless/to falsely adopt (sb's identity etc); to feign/(literary) to cover

must_distinguish.note: 发出 = emit/send out (sound, light, signals, notifications). 排放 = discharge/emit (pollutants, gases, industrial waste). 放射 = radiate (radiation, rays, spreading outward from a point). 冒 = emit/give off (smoke, steam, bubble up; also 'brave').
冬 (5k) = winter (basic morpheme, used in compounds); 冬季 = the winter season (fuller, used in weather forecasts, formal contexts).

cedict_en: the five Liang of the Sixteen Kingdoms, namely: Former Liang 前涼|前凉 (314-376), Later Liang 後涼|后凉 (386-403), Northern Liang 北涼|北凉 (398-439), Southern Liang 南涼|南凉[Nan2 Liang2] (397-414), Western Liang 西涼|西凉 (400-421)/cool/cold/to let sth cool down
dataset_meanings: the five Liang of the Sixteen Kingdoms, namely: Former Liang 前凉 (314-376), Later Liang 后凉 (386-403), Northern Liang 北凉 (398-439), Southern Liang 南凉 (397-414), Western Liang 西凉 (400-421)

must_distinguish.note: 凉 is mildly cool/cold (pleasant or neutral); 寒冷 is unpleasantly cold (weather adjective); 严寒 (5k) is literary 'bitter/severe cold'; 冻 (5k) is the physical sensation/action of freezing
开水 (5k) = boiled water (hot or cooled but safe); 凉水 = cool/unboiled water (raw tap water, not safe to drink by Chinese convention)

cedict_en: to lower/to decrease/to reduce/to subtract/to diminish

must_distinguish.note: 减 = subtract/reduce (math, general morpheme); 减少 = reduce in quantity/amount; 缩小 = shrink in size/scope; 压缩 = compress (file, gas, cut budget tightly); 降低 = bring down a level or standard
减轻 = reduce the weight/burden/severity (measurable decrease); 缓解 = ease/relieve temporarily (symptoms, pressure); 缓和 = relax/defuse (tension, conflict, relations).
Both introduce a cause: 由于 = 'due to' (neutral, factual cause, can precede or follow the result clause); 出于 = 'out of' a motive or feeling (always introduces internal motivation, e.g. 出于好意)

cedict_en: to sell/to offer for sale/to put on the market

must_distinguish.note: 卖 = everyday sell (colloquial, any context); 出售 = offer for sale (formal/written, e.g. signs); 销售 = sell as a business activity or sales volume (corporate/econ.)

cedict_en: to go abroad; to leave the country
dataset_meanings: to go abroad; to leave the country

must_distinguish.note: 出国 = go abroad (verb-action, crossing the border); 国外 = abroad/overseas (location noun, neutral); 海外 = overseas (location noun, implies sea crossing, often diaspora/global); 留学 = study abroad (verb, specifically for education)
出租 = rent out to someone (landlord/lessor perspective); 租赁 = lease/rental arrangement (neutral legal term, used by either party)

cedict_en: to divide sth into (parts); to subdivide

must_distinguish.note: 分为 = formally classified as (describes result category). 分成 = split into (concrete partitioning, focus on outcome parts). 划分 = demarcate/divide (official boundaries or categories).
隔/隔开 = separate by physical barrier or interval; 分开 = split apart (general, reversible); 分离 = separate with a sense of parting (often people/components); 分散 = scatter/disperse into multiple parts

cedict_en: to divide (into)/to split a bonus/to break into/tenths/percentage allotment

must_distinguish.note: 分为 = formally classified as (describes result category). 分成 = split into (concrete partitioning, focus on outcome parts). 划分 = demarcate/divide (official boundaries or categories).

分数 = score/grade (numeric, exam result); 等级 = rank/grade (hierarchical tier, formal); 级别 = level/rank (position in a system or organization); 档次 = quality tier/class (consumer or social grade, colloquial)
隔/隔开 = separate by physical barrier or interval; 分开 = split apart (general, reversible); 分离 = separate with a sense of parting (often people/components); 分散 = scatter/disperse into multiple parts

cedict_en: to arrange/to line up/file/series/(in data tables) column/(Tw) row

must_distinguish.note: 排 = a physical row (seats, troops); 列 = a column/series, also 'to enumerate'; 排列 = to arrange in order (verb)
火车 = train (everyday spoken word); 列车 = train (formal/written, also used for scheduled train services)

cedict_en: first year in junior middle school/first day of a lunar month
dataset_meanings: first year in junior middle school

must_distinguish.note: 早期 = relatively early stage (not necessarily the very beginning); 初期 = initial/opening stage (the very start); 初 = the beginning point itself; 阶段 = one phase in a development sequence; 时期 = a broader era or epoch

All mean 'other': 别的 = colloquial 'other/else' (can modify both people and things); 其他 = neutral 'other' (people or things, standard written form); 其它 = variant of 其他 restricted to non-person referents
到来 = arrival of events/seasons/eras (often abstract); 到达 = neutral physical arrival at a place; 抵达 = formal written arrival; 来到 = arrive toward the speaker/scene
造 = make/build/create (general, broad); 制成 = manufacture into a finished product (stresses the end result of production).
前 is the base morpheme (front/before); 前面 and 前头 are synonymous locatives (ahead/in front), 前头 being slightly more colloquial; 面前 means 'in front of / before (someone)', always person-referential

All relate to 'in front'. 前 is the bare morpheme; 前面 is neutral 'in front (of sth)'; 前头 is colloquial spoken; 面前 is 'before sb' (relational, often figurative); 跟前 is 'right beside/in front of sb' (very close proximity).

cedict_en: to go forward/to forge ahead/to advance/onward

must_distinguish.note: 前进 = move forward / advance (intransitive, of people, armies, causes); 推进 = push forward / propel (transitive, someone/something drives a process or object ahead).
前进 = move/march forward (physical or metaphorical progress); 推进 = drive/advance sth forward (active effort, project or policy); 飞跃 = leap/make a great advance (dramatic, non-linear progress).

cedict_en: to remain; to be left over
dataset_meanings: to remain; to be left over

must_distinguish.note: 剩/剩下 = be left over after use/consumption; 残留 = linger on as a remnant or residue (often negative connotation: pollutant, trace)
剪子 = scissors (colloquial/dialectal); 剪刀 = scissors (standard written form); same object, register differs

cedict_en: (formal) to apply; to carry out; to take action to (do sth) (used before a disyllabic verb, indicating that the action is directed at sth previously mentioned, e.g. 加以說明|加以说明[jia1 yi3 shuo1 ming2]); to apply (restrictions etc); to give (support, consideration etc)/(literary) moreover; in addition
dataset_meanings: (used before a disyllabic verb to indicate that the action of the verb is applied to sth or sb previously mentioned)

must_distinguish.note: 加以 = apply an action to sth (followed by a verb: 加以解释, 加以改进); 予以 = grant/give formally (official contexts: 予以表彰); 给予 = give/render (literary/formal, broader objects: attention, support).

cedict_en: to accelerate; to speed up; to hasten

must_distinguish.note: 加速 = accelerate (physics/formal, rate of speed); 加快 = speed up a pace or progress (broader, less technical)

cedict_en: to accelerate; to speed up; to expedite

must_distinguish.note: 加速 = accelerate (physics/formal, rate of speed); 加快 = speed up a pace or progress (broader, less technical)

cedict_en: to sway/to waver/to rock/to rattle/to destabilize/to pose a challenge to

must_distinguish.note: 动摇 = waver in resolve/conviction (figurative, about willpower or stance); 摇 = physically shake or rock; 摇摆 = sway back and forth (physical or figurative indecision)
北 is the basic direction word; 北方 denotes 'the north' as a broad cultural/geographic region; 北部 is 'the northern part of' a specific entity (country, city).
药物 = a drug or medication (the substance); 医学 = medicine as a scientific field of study — both translate to 'medicine' in English
Both mean kilogram. 公斤 is the everyday spoken form; 千克 is the official SI/scientific term, used in technical and written contexts.
涨/上涨/涨价 = prices/levels surge (market connotation); 上升/升 = rise physically or in rank; 升高 = rise in measurable degree (temperature, level); 提高 = raise intentionally (quality, standard)
华人 = any ethnic Chinese person (worldwide); 华裔 = person of Chinese descent born/raised abroad; 华侨 = Chinese national residing overseas (retains PRC/ROC citizenship)
华语 = Chinese language (term used in SE Asia diaspora communities); 语言 = language in general (abstract noun); 语 = language/speech (suffix/root in compounds); 母语 = native/mother tongue (any language)
合同 (5k) = contract (legally binding, commercial); 协议书 = written agreement (broader, may be less formal than a contract — MOUs, protocols).
通知书 = one-way written notice (authority → recipient); 协议书 = bilateral written agreement between parties
单一 = single/uniform/homogeneous (adjective describing lack of variety, e.g. 单一结构); 单 = single/odd number/a bill or form (broader: also means receipt, list, unpaired).

cedict_en: to sell/to betray/to spare no effort/to show off or flaunt

must_distinguish.note: 卖 = everyday sell (colloquial, any context); 出售 = offer for sale (formal/written, e.g. signs); 销售 = sell as a business activity or sales volume (corporate/econ.)

cedict_en: south; southern direction/(in China) southern regions, often referring to areas south of the Yangtze River
dataset_meanings: the southern part of the country

must_distinguish.note: 南方 = the South as a cultural/geographic region (e.g. 南方人); 南部 = the southern portion of a specific territory or country (administrative sub-area)
南方 = the South as a cultural/geographic region (e.g. 南方人); 南部 = the southern portion of a specific territory or country (administrative sub-area)
厅 = hall or living room (general); 大厅 = large public lobby/hall (e.g. hotel, station); 客厅 = living room specifically in a home

All relate to 'original': 原 = attributive 'former/original' (literary); 原有 = 'pre-existing, what was already there' (factual); 原始 = 'primitive/primordial' or 'raw/source' (strongest sense of going back to origins)
